5409110353.query:
👤 user commands:
/start — bot start + activation
/activate key — key se activate karo
/buy — premium plan kharidna
/myplan — apna plan dekho
/me — quick profile
/mystars — saved movies
/myhistory — search history
/trending — top 10 downloads
/help — help
/cmd — ye list

⭐ acting admin (lv1+):
/fetch   — movies fetch karo
/code   — links by server

⭐⭐ acting admin (lv2+):
/genkey   — keys banao
/keys — unused keys list
/ban  — user ban
/unban  — user unban
/actuser   — manual activate
/adddays   — days badao
/revoke  — access hatao
/actlist — active users

⭐⭐⭐ acting admin (lv3+):
/broadcast  — sab ko message

👑 main admin only:
/settings — bot settings (inline)
/addadmin   — acting admin banao
/removeadmin  — admin hatao
/admins — admin list
/badword — reply karke bad word add
/removebadword  — bad word hatao
/badwords — list dekho
/badlogs — bad word logs
/setwelcome  — welcome message
/setchannel <@channel> — force join channel
/setupi  — upi id set karo
/deleteentry  — movie delete
/status — bot stats
/payments — pending payments
/searchlog  — user ki history
